data.name: DownloadSmsText
data.value: Dear user, Here is the download link for Twelve Super App: https://dl.12application.ir/twelve.apk

data.name: DownloadSmsSent
data.value: The SMS with the download link has been sent to your phone number.

data.name: PasswordSmsSent
data.value: An SMS containing your password has been sent to your phone number.

data.name: SmsError
data.value: An error occurred while sending the SMS. Please try again.
